summary: FR-SLOT-06B/FR-TODAY-05 Dismissible Schedule Prompts A: source-owned hide-for-one-Today-date flow. Migration 0006 adds nullable events.schedule_prompt_dismissed_on (ALTER ADD COLUMN, no rebuild); PATCH /api/events/:id/schedule-prompt/dismiss validates strict body, 404 (findById) vs 409 SCHEDULE_PROMPT_NOT_ELIGIBLE via a single guarded UPDATE (cairn/self_imposed=1/start&end null/planned) that writes only schedule_prompt_dismissed_on+updated_at and is idempotent; GET /api/today passes the query date so prompts dismissed for that date are excluded (reappear on later dates). Shared DismissSchedulePromptRequest/Data schemas (strict, real-date refine, reject score/autoApply/snoozedUntil/taskId); EventRowSchema += optional nullable schedulePromptDismissedOn. Today.tsx compact '오늘 숨기기' action (44px semantic, focus-visible) using surface.date, success refresh / failure scoped alert, no slot/schedule calls. Committed e56a4d3.
